allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@google/genai'\); console.log\('exports:', Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,20\)\); console.log\('version:', require\('@google/genai/package.json'\).version\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('@google/genai'\).then\(m => { const c = new m.GoogleGenAI\({apiKey:'x'}\); console.log\('client props:', Object.keys\(c\)\); if\(c.models\) console.log\('models methods:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.models\)\)\); }\);")

PowerShell($dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\tools"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $dest\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest -Force | Out-Null }; $zip = Join-Path $dest "openscad-2025.07.20.zip"; Write-Output "Downloading to $zip..."; $ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://files.openscad.org/snapshots/OpenSCAD-2025.07.20-x86-64.zip" -OutFile $zip -UseBasicParsing; "Downloaded: $\(\(Get-Item $zip\).Length / 1MB\) MB")

PowerShell($dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\tools"; $zip = Join-Path $dest "openscad-2025.07.20.zip"; $extractRoot = Join-Path $dest "openscad-extract"; if \(Test-Path $extractRoot\) { Remove-Item $extractRoot -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $extractRoot | Out-Null; Write-Output "Extracting..."; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $extractRoot -Force; $exe = Get-ChildItem -Path $extractRoot -Filter "openscad.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($exe\) { Write-Output "Found: $\($exe.FullName\)"; $finalDir = Join-Path $dest "openscad"; if \(Test-Path $finalDir\) { Remove-Item $finalDir -Recurse -Force }; Move-Item -Path $exe.Directory.FullName -Destination $finalDir; Write-Output "Installed to: $finalDir\\openscad.exe"; Remove-Item $extractRoot -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item $zip -Force } else { Write-Output "openscad.exe not found in zip!" })

PowerShell($exe = "$env:USERPROFILE\\tools\\openscad\\openscad.exe"; $scad = Join-Path $env:TEMP "test.scad"; $stl = Join-Path $env:TEMP "test.stl"; Set-Content -Path $scad -Value "cube\([10, 20, 5], center=true\);" -Encoding utf8; & $exe -o $stl $scad 2>&1; if \(Test-Path $stl\) { "STL OK, size: $\(\(Get-Item $stl\).Length\) bytes" } else { "STL not produced" }; Remove-Item $scad,$stl -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($exe = "$env:USERPROFILE\\tools\\openscad\\openscad.exe"; $scad = Join-Path $env:TEMP "test.scad"; $stl = Join-Path $env:TEMP "test.stl"; if \(Test-Path $stl\) { Remove-Item $stl }; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($scad, "cube\([10, 20, 5], center=true\);", [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); $stderr = Join-Path $env:TEMP "scad.err"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList @\("-o", $stl, $scad\) -NoNewWindow -Wait -PassThru -RedirectStandardError $stderr; "ExitCode: $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; "STL exists: $\(Test-Path $stl\)"; if \(Test-Path $stl\) { "Size: $\(\(Get-Item $stl\).Length\) bytes" }; "STDERR:"; Get-Content $stderr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item $scad,$stl,$stderr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($stderr = Join-Path $env:TEMP "v.err"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\OpenSCAD\\openscad.exe" -ArgumentList "--info" -NoNewWindow -Wait -PassThru -RedirectStandardError $stderr; Get-Content $stderr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 2; Remove-Item $stderr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
